headline: Datadog (DDOG) Draws Mixed Analyst Calls, Is The AI Upside Already Priced In?
summary: Datadog (DDOG) is back in focus after a flurry of mixed analyst calls, sizable AI investment plans, and the acquisition of Adaptive ML put a spotlight on its observability and AI ambitions. See our latest analysis for Datadog. Datadog’s share price has surged over the past year, with a 30 day share price return of 9.7% and a 90 day share price return of 120.44%. The 1 year total shareholder return of 75.97% and 3 year total shareholder return of 144.63% point to strong momentum building...

headline: Datadog (DDOG) Moves to Strong Buy: Rationale Behind the Upgrade
summary: Datadog (DDOG) has been upgraded to a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy), reflecting growing optimism about the company's earnings prospects. This might drive the stock higher in the near term.

headline: Datadog, Inc. (DDOG) A Top AI Stock on Wall Street’s Radar Downgraded at Bernstein SocGen
summary: Datadog, Inc. (NASDAQ:DDOG) is one of the AI stocks on Wall Street’s radar. On July 6, Bernstein SoC Gen raised the price target for Datadog (NASDAQ:DDOG) stock to $226 from $180. However, the research firm downgraded the stock to Market Perform from Outperform. The downgrade comes amid concerns that the company could face tough earnings […]

headline: Datadog: Not The Type Of SaaS Business I'm Interested In
summary: Datadog's revenue growth is increasingly reliant on upselling existing customers, with net retention rates declining. Learn why DDOG stock is a sell.
